summary: Iteration 5 bug fix testing completed. All 3 reported bugs have been fixed and verified: 1) Today's date (March 31) is now selectable for booking - timezone fix with toDateStr() working correctly, 2) Packages updated to 5 new packages with correct names/prices, 3) Instagram and Google Maps links now open in new tabs.

Basic package: 6 termina, 90 KM - PASSED

Today's slots have valid time values - PASSED
Schedule dates are in YYYY-MM-DD format - PASSED
UI: Schedule page shows today (31) as selectable (not grayed out) - PASSED
UI: Clicking today shows 7 future time slots (09:00 filtered out as past) - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: toDateStr() function in SchedulePage.jsx correctly uses local timezone (getFullYear/getMonth/getDate) instead of toISOString() which was causing UTC shift
Address card in HomePage.jsx changed from <div> to <a> tag with target=_blank for Google Maps link
Instagram link already had target=_blank, working correctly
Packages endpoint returns 5 packages with correct values matching requirements
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule slots (240 slots for 30 days)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs from Iteration 5 fixed and verified. Phone OTP is MOCKED (always 123456). Schedule data comes from MongoDB with 8 slots per day. The toDateStr() function in SchedulePage.jsx now uses local timezone to avoid UTC shift issues. Today's past time slots are correctly filtered out. All 5 packages display correctly with updated names/prices. Instagram and Google Maps links open in new tabs.

mocked_apis.phone_otp: Always returns 123456 - SMS not actually sent

bug_1_timezone.description: Can't select today's date (March 31) for booking - timezone issue with toISOString()
bug_1_timezone.fix: Added toDateStr() helper function using local getFullYear/getMonth/getDate instead of toISOString()
bug_1_timezone.status: FIXED - Today (March 31) is selectable and shows 7 future time slots

bug_2_packages.description: Packages need to be updated to new values
bug_2_packages.fix: Updated /api/packages endpoint with 5 new packages: Basic(6/90), Linea Active(8/125), Linea Balance(10/145), Linea Gold(12/175), Linea Premium(16/200)

bug_3_links.description: Instagram and Google Maps links don't open when clicked
bug_3_links.fix: Address card changed from <div> to <a> tag with target=_blank. Instagram already had target=_blank.
bug_3_links.status: FIXED - Both links open in new tabs
